description: Style Note Super soft vintage leather and a variety of hues to choose from, wallets from fossil are the way to go for a look that chic and versatile effortlessly. Spice up your outfit with these funky yet conventional wallets and get ready to be on top of your game! Product Details Brown three-fold wallet with a narrow flap with a press button closure, has one main compartment, multiple card slots, three insert pockets, an inner zipped pocket with an id card holder, has a buttoned pocket and zipped pocket on the front, stitch detailing and brand name on a metallic badge  Material and Care Vintage leather Wipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirt Dimensions: 10 cm x 13 cm
